zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Morteyn III於1273年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯時，他的父親John de Moretyn II25歲，母親Joan Gobion25歲。他於大約1304年與Joan Rothwell在英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1346年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Morteyn III于1273年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯时，他的父亲John de Moretyn II25岁，母亲Joan Gobion25岁。他于大约1304年与Joan Rothwell在英国貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1346年在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morteyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Morteyn III was born in 1273, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Moretyn II, was 25 and his mother, Joan Gobion, was 25. He married Joan Rothwell about 1304, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1346, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

Il a épousé Joan Rothwell environ 1304, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1346, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Morteyn IIIが1273年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスで生まれた時，父John de Moretyn IIは25歳，母Joan Gobionは25歳であった。約1304年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスでJoan Rothwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1346年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Morteyn III(이)가 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Moretyn II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Gobion(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1304년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 Joan Rothwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1346년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Morteyn III родился в 1273 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Moretyn II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Gobion, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Rothwell около 1304 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1346 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.
